name: Scientific Infographic Animation
description: Animated data visualization with text overlays, labeled illustrations, and measurements. Clean graphic design aesthetic, information-dense composition, high contrast and clarity.

visual_attributes.lighting: Even, studio lighting, high contrast for text readability
visual_attributes.texture: Clean graphic design, flat or semi-3D rendering, sharp edges
visual_attributes.camera_feel: Static or slow pan, information-focused framing

image_gen_workflow.prompt_template: [subject] scientific infographic style illustration, labeled diagram, measurements and annotations visible, clean graphic design, high contrast, educational visualization, information design aesthetic, data visualization

video_gen_workflow.motion_prompt_template: animated infographic sequence, labels and measurements appearing, data points highlighting, educational animation style, clean graphic transitions

remotion_role: Text, labels, measurements can be part of the background OR added in Remotion - use whichever produces cleaner output
